author: Toasterbath
phrase_text: In Scott Pilgrim, we are introduced to the titular Scott Pilgrim and his rock band Sex Bob-omb, which he is the bassist for. Scott and his gay roommate Wallace Wells live in a tiny little rented space, where they sleep together in the same bed on the floor for the rest of the comic series.
error: where they sleep together in the same bed on the floor for the rest of the comic series.
correction: By the fourth installment, Scott and Wallace get kicked out of their tiny, Hobbit Hole-like space and for the rest of the series afterwards, Scott lives in Ramona's apartment.
notes: Sometimes I screw up about this stuff. Please email me corrections at yourseodorantsmellslikeskunk@gmail.com if I messed up
title: Scott Pilgrim

author: audiobuddy
phrase_text: Wizard of Chicago Harry Dresden has an erstwhile rival in mob boss John Marcone, but the two are on the same side surprisingly often. Marcone, increasingly supernatural-aware, has at times provided Dresden with free mercenary backup, helicopter transport, and mission intel, but he still insists that Dresden can't call him John.
error: provided Dresden with free mercenary backup
correction: Marcone didn't supply that backup for free. He gave it on the condition that Dresden sign him into the supernatural Accords (and that Dresden say "pretty please").
title: The Dresden Files

author: enottoA
phrase_text: Despite being a founding member of the team, X-Man Beast, aka Hank McCoy has done some morally questionable things. Among these deeds are leaving a vulnerable mutant with known villain Mister Sinister purposely, causing the 1906 San Francisco Earthquake, genetic warfare, destruction of multiple earths, cloning all 5 original X-Men and aging them up to teenagers, and working with an evil version of himself, literally named Dark Beast.
error: cloning all 5 original X-Men and aging them up to teenagers
correction: He didn't clone the X-Men, but rather used time travel to bring the past versions of themselves to the present day, as a way to teach them all a lesson.
title: The X-Men

author: InternallyDead
phrase_text: In Hades, Nyx, the goddess of the night, plays a significant role in Zagreus’ journey. As Zagreus’s biological mother, she serves as his caretaker and mentor, offering guidance and wisdom. Nyx is also responsible for helping Zagreus establish contact with the Olympians, using her influence to ensure their messages reach him despite Hades’ interference.
error: As Zagreus’s biological mother
correction: Nyx is not Zagreus’ biological mother - Persephone is. Nyx is his adoptive mother, having raised him in the Underworld after Persephone left
title: Hades the Game

author: bluArrowhead
phrase_text: In the core series of Pokémon games up to Generation 6, you obtain "Hidden Moves", also known as HMs, that can be taught to Pokémon to perform moves outside of battle. These HMs include HM01 Cut (which cuts down large trees), HM03 Surf (which allows you to cross bodies of water), and HM04 Strength (which can move large boulders).
error: "Hidden Moves", also known as HMs
correction: Um, Actually, HM stands for "Hidden Machine." "Hidden Moves" are the names of the moves taught by the HM.
title: Pokemon

author: bluArrowhead
phrase_text: In the world of One Piece, one of the most sought after treasures are Devil Fruits, which give supernatural abilities to whoever consumes them. These powers can range from giving your body the properties of rubber, generating fire, and even turning into animals. However, Devil fruits do have some rules to them: A person may only have 1 devil fruit ability and they lose the ability to swim in saltwater.
error: A person may only have 1 devil fruit ability
correction: Um, Actually, it is technically possible for someone to have 2 devil fruits. The pirate Blackbeard currently posses the powers of the Yami Yami no Mi and the Gura Gura no Mi, though it is currently unknown how he was able to do this.
title: One Piece

phrase_text: In Skyrim the game starts with you and a group of prisoners about to be executed however nobody gets executed do to the dragon Alduin attacking the village.
error: nobody gets executed
correction: One stormcloak gets executed before Alduin arrives.
title: Skyrim

phrase_text: Introduced in the Deep Space Nine episode, “The Search: Part 1”, the USS Defiant is officially classed as an escort ship, was designed as a prototype warship to fight the Borg, and due to this, only one Defiant-class ship was ever created.
error: and due to this, only one Defiant-class ship was ever created.
correction: Multiple Defiant-class ships have been created, including as a replacement for when the original got destroyed at the Second Battle of Chin’toka.
title: Star Trek

phrase_text: Introduced in the Deep Space Nine episode, “The Search: Part 1”, the USS Defiant is officially classed as an escort ship, was designed as a prototype warship to fight the Borg, and due to this, only one Defiant-class ship was ever created.
error: and due to this, only one Defiant-class ship was ever created.
correction: Multiple Defiant-class ships have been created, including as a replacement for when the original got destroyed at the Second Battle of Chin’toka.
title: Star Trek

author: CB Johnny
phrase_text: Prior to becoming a professional recording artist, "Weird Al" Yankovic enjoyed submitting amateur home recorded songs for the comedy radio program The Dr. Demento Show. There, his drummer Jon Schwartz met Al outside of the station's bathroom and offered to bang on his accordion case for a live in studio performance of My Bologna.
error: My Bologna.
correction: Another One Rides the Bus.
notes: The original single version of My Bologna was recorded in a college campus bathroom.
title: "Weird Al" Yankovic

phrase_text: League of Legends is a game consisting of many game modes, most notably taking place on Summoners Rift. This game mode is a 5v5 battle consisting of 3 lanes and jungle areas inbetween. Each lane contains 3 towers which you seek to destroy to eventually break the enemy nexus.
error: Each lane contains 3 towers which you seek to destroy
correction: Each lane actually contains 6 towers between the two teams.
title: League of Legends

phrase_text: League of Legends is a game consisting of many game modes, most notably taking place on Summoners Rift. This game mode is a 5v5 battle consisting of 3 lanes and jungle areas inbetween. Each lane contains 3 towers which you seek to destroy to eventually break the enemy nexus.
error: Each lane contains 3 towers which you seek to destroy
correction: Each lane actually contains 6 towers between the two teams.
title: League of Legends

author: TDean15
phrase_text: Nimona was originally a web comic made by ND Stevenson that was published in 2015 to great acclaim. After a troubled production, a film adaptation of the same name was released in 2023. The 2 versions have a significantly different story but both focus on self-proclaimed supervillain Ballister, and Nimona, a chaotic shapeshifter who wishes to become his sidekick.
error: 'self-proclaimed supervillain'
correction: Um, actually, Ballister is not a supervillain in the film version. He is instead an outlaw after he is accused of murdering the Queen.
title: Nimona

author: TDean15
phrase_text: In the Boiling Isles, where most of The Owl House takes place, witches are assigned to covens by being branded with a sigil at an early age. Examples of these are the Bard Coven and the Construction Coven. Any witch not in a coven is known a wild witch, outlaws who are capable of all forms of magic such as Eda who does not join a coven throughout the series.
error: 'who does not join a coven throughout the series'
correction: Um, actually, Eda does join a coven. She is covenless at the start of the series but is branded with a sigil in the final episode of Series 2 as part of a plan to stop a draining spell cast by Emperor Belos.
title: The Owl House

author: TDean15
phrase_text: Contrary to popular opinion, Princess Peach is not always a damsel in distress. Peach has been a playable character in several games including in Super Mario Land, Super Mario 3D World and Super Mario Bros Wonder. She has also received 2 games of her own, Super Princess Peach for the DS and Princess Peach: Showtime! for the Nintendo Switch.
error: *in Super Mario Land*
correction: Um, actually, Peach is not a playable character in Super Mario Land.
notes: Peach was not captured, Princess Daisy was in her first appearance, but Mario was the only playable character in the game.
title: Super Mario

author: ChaFerRod
phrase_text: While many days are eventful in this series, one of the most is Thursday, July 15, 1999. On this day, Jojo and co. face off against 4 stands, including Cheap Trick, Highway Star, Enigma, and Superfly.
error: Jojo and co. face off against 4 stands, including Cheap Trick, Highway Star, Enigma, and Superfly
correction: While 4 enemy stands are the center of Thursday, Highway Star is not fought on Thursday, he in fact helps Josuke to defeat Enigma. The 4th stand of significance is Killer Queen, which unlocks the Bites the Dust ability and activates it for the first time.
title: JoJo’s Bizarre adventure

author: Ico
phrase_text: In the game Super Mario Sunshine, Mario, along with peach, toadstool, and other toads, crash into Isle Delfino, an island filled with many touristical places, such as Delfino Plaza (the capital), Sirena beach and Pina Park
error: Crash into Isle delfino
correction: They don't crash into Isle Delfino, they safely land onto Delfino airstrip
title: Super Mario Sunshine.

phrase_text: Foster child Billy Batson meets a wizard who grants him the ability to transform into an adult superhero, with powers such as flight and super strength. However, he's still a child at heart, which explains why he likes to shout "Shazam" when he transforms, and also why one of the first things he did as a hero was try to buy beer.
error: However, he's still a child at heart, which explains why he likes to shout "Shazam" when he transforms, and also why one of the first things he did as a hero was try to buy beer.
correction: That's not why he shouts "Shazam!" Shazam is the name of the wizard who gave him the powers, and Billy must invoke his name to transform.
notes: Shazam is actually an acronym, representing the six gods which empower the given champion, being the wisdom of Solomon, the strength of Hercules, the stamina of Atlas, the lightning of Zeus, the courage of Achilles, and the speed of Mercury.
title: Shazam! (2019 Film)

author: Redmin
phrase_text: In Fallout: New Vegas, our player, the courier, is greeted by Benny with a monologue and a bullet to the head. Benny is the head of the Chairman whose family runs the Tops casino, one of the three casinos in the Vegas Strip that work under Mr. House. The other two casinos consist of the Ultra-Luxe, ran by the White Glove Society, and the Lucky 38, which serves as the base of operations for Mr. House and is closed to the public, except for the courier.
error: one of the three casinos in the Vegas Strip
correction: Um, actually the Vegas Strip has four casinos; the fourth being the Gomorrah, ran by the Omertas.
title: Fallout: New Vegas

author: SuperCJM
phrase_text: Among the three hidden opponents in Mortal Kombat II is Noob Saibot. Though his name is that of Mortal Kombat's creator, Tobias Boon, spelled backwards, it would later be revealed in Mortal Kombat: Deception that he is actually the undead Wraith form of Bi-Han, the original Sub-Zero.
error: Though his name is that of Mortal Kombat's creator, Tobias Boon, spelled backwards
correction: Mortal Kombat has two creators, Ed Boon and John Tobias, whose surnames spelled backwards form Noob Saibot's name
title: Mortal Kombat

author: SuperCJM
phrase_text: Among the three hidden opponents in Mortal Kombat II is Noob Saibot. Though his name is that of Mortal Kombat's creator, Tobias Boon, spelled backwards, it would later be revealed in Mortal Kombat: Deception that he is actually the undead Wraith form of Bi-Han, the original Sub-Zero.
error: Though his name is that of Mortal Kombat's creator, Tobias Boon, spelled backwards
correction: Mortal Kombat has two creators, Ed Boon and John Tobias, whose surnames spelled backwards form Noob Saibot's name
title: Mortal Kombat

author: SuperCJM
phrase_text: Walt Disney holds the record for both the most Oscar nominations and the most Oscar wins of any individual person, at 59 and 22, respectively. Though he was given Honorary Oscars for Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs and Fantasia, all of his competitive nominations were in the Documentary and Short Film categories.
error: all of his competitive nominations were in the Documentary and Short Film categories.
correction: He received one competitive Oscar nomination for a feature-length narrative film, that being a Best Picture nomination for Mary Poppins.
title: The Oscars

author: goldpuffle
phrase_text: Wood can be used to make many things, and different types of wood give rise to different textures of these things. There are some exceptions, though, such as bookshelves, paintings, chests, and crafting tables, which just default to one of the existing wood textures.
error: bookshelves, paintings, chests, and crafting tables, which just default to one of the existing wood textures.
correction: Paintings don't match the texture of any wood in the game and never have.
title: Minecraft

author: Yogsy
phrase_text: In House MD, the titular character Gregory House cycles through many residents. One resident was Amber Volakis, who despite no longer being an employee in the Princeton Plainsboro diagnostics department, returns to the show as the girlfriend of James Wilson before she passes away as a result of taking Zanamivir, a flu medication.
error: she passes away as a result of taking Zanamivir, a flu medication.
correction: Um, Actually, Amber takes Amantadine.
notes: Kind of a spoiler?
title: House MD

author: Yogsy
phrase_text: There are 177 episodes of House MD, following Gregory House, head of the diagnostics department of Princeton Plainsboro Teaching Hospital, and his team. A running joke in the show is that House has never had a case of Lupus, resulting in the popular meme of people saying "it's never lupus" when talking about the show. However, House did have a case of Lupus one time in season 4, episode 14, "Living the Dream", when a celebrity that House likes comes down with the disease.
error: in season 4, episode 14, "Living the Dream", when a celebrity that House likes comes down with the disease.
correction: Um, Actually, House's only case of Lupus is in season 4, episode 8, "You Don't Want To Know", where a magician at a show that Kutner and Cole are at contracts the disease.
title: House MD

author: QzMajor
phrase_text: In the 2012 version of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, there is many villains who are human or aliens from other dimensions but there is also plenty of mutant villains as well. Bebop and Rocksteady, who were thieves turned into a rhinoceros and warthog respectively. Karai who was Shredder's daughter that was turned into a snake. and finally Dogpound (later known as Rahzar) and Fishface, who was Tim Bradford and Xever Montes prior to being mutated.
error: Karai who was Shredder's daughter
correction: Um actually Karai was not Shredder's daughter, Karai was the daughter of Hamato Yoshi who was stolen by Shredder as sort of revenge against Hamato Yoshi
title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles

author: QzMajor
phrase_text: In the 2012 version of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, there is many villains who are human or aliens from other dimensions but there is also plenty of mutant villains as well. Bebop and Rocksteady, who were thieves turned into a rhinoceros and warthog respectively. Karai who was Shredder's daughter that was turned into a snake. and finally Dogpound (later known as Rahzar) and Fishface, who was Tim Bradford and Xever Montes prior to being mutated.
error: Karai who was Shredder's daughter
correction: Um actually Karai was not Shredder's daughter, Karai was the daughter of Hamato Yoshi who was stolen by Shredder as sort of revenge against Hamato Yoshi
title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles

author: Joekerr019
phrase_text: In the Kevin Smith movie "Clerks". We see the trials and tribulations of one Dante Hicks. From being forced to go to work on his free day,  to the gum jamming the shutters,  to a hockey game going wrong.  To even his co worker dale leaving Dante working  all day and going to Maine. To even finding out that his girlfriend thinks he is a pig for sleeping with seven girls while she went down on 37 guys
error: Co worker dale leaving Dante working all day and going up Maine
correction: Actually it was a guy called Snyder who went to Vermont
title: Clerks

author: DaxAttacks
phrase_text:
Sernuks are graceful deer-like creatures that symbolize honor, tradition, and longevity in the world of Palia.
Despite being accidentally introduced to the Kilima Ecosystem by Kenli (who thought they'd be good pets), The Order has happily accepted them and now even breed their own "Proudhorned Sernuk", to pull their carriages
error: Despite being accidentally introduced to the Kilima Ecosystem by Kenli
correction: Chapaas were the animals Kenli introduced, Sernuk are native to Kilima
title: Palia

author: DaxAttacks
phrase_text:
Sernuks are graceful deer-like creatures that symbolize honor, tradition, and longevity in the world of Palia.
Despite being accidentally introduced to the Kilima Ecosystem by Kenli (who thought they'd be good pets), The Order has happily accepted them and now even breed their own "Proudhorned Sernuk", to pull their carriages
error: Despite being accidentally introduced to the Kilima Ecosystem by Kenli
correction: Chapaas were the animals Kenli introduced, Sernuk are native to Kilima
title: Palia

author: darjella
phrase_text: In the video game Palia, humans are a legendary race that mysteriously went extinct thousands of years ago. As the player, you are the first human to be seen since then when you are located at the Phoenix Shrine by the archaeologist, Jina.
error: Um actually, you are just one of many reemerging humans.
correction: Palia is an MMO and canonically, every player is a reemerged human.
title: Palia

author: Dennish
phrase_text: Monster Hunter: World, is a videogame developed and published by the company Bandai Namco, that has been widely debated as to whether or not it can be considered a JRPG or an Action RPG. Monster Hunter: World does possess features of a JRPG, but unlike other JRPG titles such as Dragon Quest, Yakuza: Like A Dragon and Persona. It lacks the strong narrative focus and turn based combat. Rather, focusing on real-time combat, gear-based progression and grinding.
error: Monster Hunter: World, is a videogame developed and published by the company Bandai Namco
correction: Monster Hunter: World was actually developed and published by CAPCOM.
title: Monster Hunter: World

author: Memealicious
phrase_text: In the original 1989 run of the series Quantum Leap, Scott Bakula plays Dr. Sam Beckett. He’s a scientific prodigy who studies string theory, and in an experiment into time travel, he gains the ability for his conscious to travel to any point in time. However, he cannot control where he goes and only transfers into the body of other people. In his adventures, he ends up in the body of a black man in the 1950s South, a person with down syndrome, and a transgender escort.
error: he gains the ability for his conscious to travel to any point in time
correction: Um, Actually: he can only time travel to any point during his lifetime (1953-1989)
notes: In the 2022 Reboot, the main character Dr. Ben Song can travel to any point in history.
title: Quantum Leap

phrase_text: In the original 1989 run of the series Quantum Leap, Scott Bakula plays Dr. Sam Beckett. author: Memealicious
phrase_text: The Pixar movie “Finding Nemo” has a large scientific inaccuracy. The False Ocellaris Clownfish, which Marlin is based on, is a protogynous hermaphrodite. This means that since Nemo’s mother died, Marlin should have biologically changed into a female.
error: protogynous hermaphrodite
correction: Um Actually, They are not protogynous hermaphrodites, they are protandrous hermaphrodites.
notes: Protandrous hermaphrodites start as males and become females to increase fecundity (egg production).
title: Finding Nemo

author: Memealicious
phrase_text: Mel Gibson plays a former cop called Max Rockatansky in the Mad Max Series. The series details the story of this cop through the fall of society in Australia. It depicts a world after a resources war, with warring factions fighting over the precious resource of gasoline, water, and bullets. Despite this, these factions fight in tricked out cars including Max’s 1973 Ford Falcon Interceptor, and Furiosa’s War Rig semi-truck in Mad Max: Fury Road.
error: gasoline
correction: Um Actually, they’re fighting over Guzzolene not Gasoline.
notes: Society really falls quickly
title: Mad Max

author: Memealicious
phrase_text: In the Fallout series, Vault-Tec is the company that produces the vaults to preserve humanity after a nuclear war. However, most of these vaults were actually experiments on the human psyche, such as vaults pumped with hallucinogenic drugs, a vault with a man and a box of puppets, a vault with 999 men and one woman, a vault with 999 women and one man, and a vault where they elect a human sacrifice. The only vault without an experiment was vault 101 seen in Fallout 3.
error: The only vault without an experiment was vault 101 seen in Fallout 3.
correction: Um actually, Vault 101 did have an experiment, the vault was never supposed to open.
notes: Vault 101 is the origin of the Lone Wanderer, the main character of Fallout 3. The vault did not contain a G.E.C.K (Garden of Eden Creation Kit) to recolonize the outside world.
title: Fallout

author: Memealicious
phrase_text: In The Star Trek: The Next Generation Episode “Darmok”, The crew of the Starship Enterprise meets a ship of Tamarians. Even with the universal translator equipped from Star Fleet, the Tamarians are unable to be understood. This is because their grammar is based on metaphor, where the Tamarians use stories to convey meaning. Captain Picard learns this after the Tamarians strand him and their captain on a planet together.
error: metaphor
correction: Um Actually they communicate in allegory, not metaphor.
notes: Metaphors use direct comparisons to convey meaning, whereas allegory uses story to convey a meaning.
title: Star Trek

author: Memealicious
phrase_text: In Douglas Adams’ Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, Arthur Dent and Ford Prefect are taken onto a Vogon Ship. Vogons are known as the bureaucrats of the universe. To torture people, they use poetry; Vogon poetry is the worst poetry in the universe, and the main characters are subjected to it before being thrown out of an airlock, only to be saved by the Infinite Improbability Drive of the Heart of Gold ship.
error: he worst poetry in the universe
correction: Um Actually, Vogon Poetry is the 3rd worst poetry in the universe.
notes: The Azgoths of Kria are the 2nd worst with poems like Ode to a Small Lump of Green Putty I Found in My Armpit One Midsummer Morning, and the absolute worst belongs to Paula Nancy Millstone Jennings of Sussex, who was destroyed when Earth was blown up to make a hyperspace expressway
title: Hitchiker's Guide to the Galaxy

author: Memealicious
phrase_text: The Walking Dead series is famous for never using the word “zombie”. Words like walkers, geeks, growlers, rotters, and Homo Mortis have been used instead of zombie. This is because within the universe of The Walking Dead, George A. Romero’s Night of the Living Dead was never made, and zombie was a word used in voodoo culture.
error: George A. Romero’s Night of the Living Dead was never made
correction: Um Actually, Night of the Living Dead was made, but sequels were never made, so there was never a widespread zombie culture to use the word.
notes: The movie was made; however, it was a cult film rather than a cultural touchstone of zombie media. The word comes from nzambi, meaning spirit of a dead person in many west african languages.
title: The Walking Dead

author: Memealicious
phrase_text: In the Smiling Friends episode “Who violently murdered Simon S. Salty”, there is a character named Grease that was originally meant to be played by the Internet lolcow Christine Weston Chandler. However, due to their criminal actions, Christine was unable to play the character. It was then played by Harry Partridge doing an impression of Christine.
error: due to their criminal actions
correction: Um actually, Chris-chan couldn’t play the character because of the show’s cameo budget.
notes: If you wanna know what happened, look it up, I'm not explaining it.
title: Smiling Friends

author: mantechcc
phrase_text: Full Metal Alchemist (2003) and Full Metal Alchemist :Brotherhood (2009) both adapt the Manga but the 2003 version focuses on the emotional impact of human transmutation and loss by introducing unique characters such as Nina, Dante, and Lyra.
error: unique characters such as Nina
correction: umm actually, Nina is in both the 2009 and 2003 anime adaptations
notes: 2003's FMA adaptation has a unique story line as it deviated from the Manga about half way through the story and created a unique ending before the Manga was completed.
title: Full Metal Alchemist

author: mantechcc
phrase_text: Full Metal Alchemist (2003) and Full Metal Alchemist :Brotherhood (2009) both adapt the Manga but the 2003 version focuses on the emotional impact of human transmutation and loss by introducing unique characters such as Nina, Dante, and Lyra.
error: unique characters such as Nina
correction: umm actually, Nina is in both the 2009 and 2003 anime adaptations
notes: 2003's FMA adaptation has a unique story line as it deviated from the Manga about half way through the story and created a unique ending before the Manga was completed.
title: Full Metal Alchemist

author: mantechcc
phrase_text: Homonculi are alchemically created humanoids in the Full Metal Alchemist universes. Full Metal Alchemist (2003), Full Metal Alchemist: Beotherhood (2009), and the Manga all feature the same seven homunculi, named after the seven deadly sins.
error: same seven homonculi
correction: the Manga's and 2009 anime's Wrath was called Pride in the 2003 anime. Also, Sloth and Wrath are completely different homonculi in the 2003 anime.
notes:
Sloth (2003) is the failed mother transmuataion of Alphonse and Edward Elric

Wrath (2003) is the failed son transmuatation of Izumi Curtis
title: Full Metal Alchemist

phrase_text: In Exploding Kittens, players will try to avoid drawing the Exploding Kitten using their ability cards, such as See the Future, Attack, Favor, Skip, and most importantly, Defuse. Moreover, some combinations of cards can also help with that, like two-of-a-kind, three-of-a-kind, and five-of-a-kind.
error: Moreover, some combinations of cards can also help with that, like two-of-a-kind, three-of-a-kind, and five-of-a-kind.
correction: Um, actually, five-of-a-kind is NOT a combination, what you actually want is five of the different types.
notes: There are other cards that are not in the base game, such as alter the future, swap top to bottom, draw from the bottom, and streaking kitten.
title: Exploding Kittens

phrase_text: The first trilogy of the Ace Attorney series revolves around Phoenix Wright, the protagonist, taking cases of innocent clients, usually accused of murder, although there was one time which the crime wasn't initially such, it was originally a robbery.
error: taking cases of innocent clients
correction: Even though at the beginning of the case, it was believed to be innocent, in Ace Attorney: Justice for All, the second game, in the last case, the client Matt Engarde is actually guilty of the crime.
title: Ace Attorney

phrase_text: The first trilogy of the Ace Attorney series revolves around Phoenix Wright, the protagonist, taking cases of innocent clients, usually accused of murder, although there was one time which the crime wasn't initially such, it was originally a robbery.
error: taking cases of innocent clients
correction: Even though at the beginning of the case, it was believed to be innocent, in Ace Attorney: Justice for All, the second game, in the last case, the client Matt Engarde is actually guilty of the crime.
title: Ace Attorney

author: RubyBlue42
phrase_text: In the 2006 film Idiocracy, average man Joe is frozen as part of a military experiment, and awakens 500 years later to discover that the average intelligence has plummeted and humans are now all crude and moronic.  After taking an IQ test in prison, Joe is eventually appointed Secretary of Agriculture by President Dwayne Elizondo Mountain Dew Herbert Camacho, and must improve crop yields nation-wide, or face imprisonment.
error: Secretary of Agriculture
correction: Joe is appointed Secretary of the Interior, not Agriculture.
notes: The Secretary of the Interior would not normally be the one tasked with improving crop yields, but President Camacho isn't that smart.
title: Idiocracy
